export const colorValues = {

    primary: "#007A99",
    secondary: "#406AD4",
    success: "#058059",
    warning: "#E8BF2B",
    error: "#D22E3E",
    info: "#0E76B2",
    gray: "#5F7186",
    white: "#ffffff",
    black: "#000000",

    background: "#F8FAFC",
    surface: "#FFFFFF",

    text: "#0F172A",
    "text-inverted": "#F1F5F9",
    "text-weak": "#334155",
    "text-weaker": "#475569",
    "text-weakest": "#64748B",
} as const;

export const darkModeColorValues = {

    primary: "#007A99",
    secondary: "#406AD4",
    success: "#058059",
    warning: "#E8BF2B",
    error: "#D22E3E",
    info: "#0E76B2",
    gray: "#5F7186",

    background: "#15181E",
    surface: "#1C2028",

    text: "#F1F5F9",
    "text-inverted": "#0F172A",
    "text-weak": "#CBD5E1",
    "text-weaker": "#94A3B8",
    "text-weakest": "#64748B",
};

export const fontSizeValues = {
    default: "@font-size.md",
    "3xs": "0.5rem",
    "2xs": "0.625rem",
    xs: "0.75rem",
    sm: "0.875rem",
    md: "1rem",
    lg: "1.125rem",
    xl: "1.25rem",
    "2xl": "1.5rem",
    "3xl": "1.875rem",
    "4xl": "2.25rem",
} as const;

export const boxShadowValues = {
    default: "@box-shadow.md",
    none: "none",
    xs: "0 1px 1px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.12), 0 2px 2px -1px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.06)",
    sm: "0 1px 2px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.14), 0 3px 6px -1px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.10)",
    md: "0 2px 4px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.16), 0 8px 16px -4px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.10)",
    lg: "0 4px 8px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.18), 0 16px 24px -8px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.12)",
    xl: "0 8px 12px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.20), 0 24px 48px -12px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.14)",
    "2xl":
        "0 12px 16px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.22), 0 32px 64px -16px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.16)",
    inner:
        "inset 0 1px 0 oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.08), inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.06)",
    ring: "0 0 0 1px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.12), 0 1px 2px oklch(var(--box-shadow-color, 0 0 0) / 0.08)",
} as const;

export const fontWeightValues = {
    default: "@font-weight.normal",
    extralight: 200,
    light: 300,
    normal: "normal",
    medium: 500,
    semibold: 600,
    bold: "bold",
    black: 900,
    lighter: "lighter",
    bolder: "bolder",
    inherit: "inherit",
} as const;

export const spacingValues = {
    default: "@spacing.md",
    "2xs": "0.25rem",
    xs: "0.5rem",
    sm: "0.75rem",
    md: "1rem",
    lg: "1.5rem",
    xl: "2rem",
    "2xl": "3rem",
    "3xl": "4rem",
} as const;

export const backgroundBlendModeValues = {
    normal: "normal",
    multiply: "multiply",
    screen: "screen",
    overlay: "overlay",
    darken: "darken",
    lighten: "lighten",
    "color-dodge": "color-dodge",
    "color-burn": "color-burn",
    "hard-light": "hard-light",
    "soft-light": "soft-light",
    difference: "difference",
    exclusion: "exclusion",
    hue: "hue",
    saturation: "saturation",
    color: "color",
    luminosity: "luminosity",
} as const;

export const mixBlendModeValues = {
    normal: "normal",
    multiply: "multiply",
    screen: "screen",
    overlay: "overlay",
    darken: "darken",
    lighten: "lighten",
    "color-dodge": "color-dodge",
    "color-burn": "color-burn",
    "hard-light": "hard-light",
    "soft-light": "soft-light",
    difference: "difference",
    exclusion: "exclusion",
    hue: "hue",
    saturation: "saturation",
    color: "color",
    luminosity: "luminosity",
    "plus-darker": "plus-darker",
    "plus-lighter": "plus-lighter",
} as const;

export const borderStyleValues = {
    default: "@border-style.solid",
    none: "none",
    solid: "solid",
    dashed: "dashed",
    dotted: "dotted",
    double: "double",
    groove: "groove",
    inset: "inset",
    outset: "outset",
} as const;

export const scaleValues = {
    default: "@scale.minor-third",
    "minor-second": 1.067,
    "major-second": 1.125,
    "minor-third": 1.2,
    "major-third": 1.25,
    "perfect-fourth": 1.333,
    "augmented-fourth": 1.414,
    "perfect-fifth": 1.5,
    golden: 1.618,
} as const;

export const zIndexValues = {
    default: "@z-index.base",
    hide: "-1",
    base: "0",
    dropdown: "100",
    sticky: "200",
    overlay: "300",
    modal: "400",
    popover: "500",
    toast: "600",
    max: "9999",
    auto: "auto",
} as const;

import { createUseVariable } from "../utils";

export const useBorderColorDesignTokens = createUseVariable("border-color");
